name: Dabs Framework (DF)
description: Required framework dependency providing additional scripting APIs and systems used by DayZ Expansion.
overview: Dabs Framework is a required dependency for DayZ Expansion, providing additional scripting APIs, UI systems, and utility functions that the Expansion mod suite builds upon.
installation: Subscribe to DabsFramework on the Steam Workshop.
Place the @DabsFramework folder in your server's root directory.
Add @DabsFramework to your -mod= parameter after @CF but before Expansion mods.
Both clients and servers must have this mod loaded.
Restart your server to load the framework.

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure DabsFramework is installed and loaded before any Expansion mods in the -mod= parameter.

useCases.title: Expansion Prerequisite
useCases.description: Required by all Expansion mods — must be installed alongside CF.

useCases.title: Expansion Prerequisite
useCases.description:
Required by all Expansion mods. It must be installed alongside CF.

Dabs Framework is used for all the menus (UI) made in Expansion.

_blockData.content: Dabs Framework is a required dependency for DayZ Expansion, providing additional scripting APIs, UI systems, and utility functions that the Expansion mod suite builds upon.

steps: Subscribe to Dabs Framework on the Steam Workshop.
Place the @Dabs Framework folder in your server's root directory.
Both clients and servers must have this mod loaded.
Restart your server to load the framework.

useCases.title: Dabs Framework mods not loading
useCases.description:
Dabs Framework is missing the `-` in its mod name. If your server isnt quoting the launch paramaters this may cause issues.

Try the following
`"-mod=@Dabs Framework"`.

If you are unable to modify directly the launch parameter. Remove the space in the mod name in your launcher parameters and on the folder.
